Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks 106 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. OpenRocket 480 upvotes, 88 comments
  3. On a Boat 143 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 233 upvotes, 46 comments
  5. Autoresearch for SAT Solvers 84 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 218 upvotes, 49 comments
  7. Czech Man's Stone in Barn's Foundations Is Rare Bronze Age Spearhead Mold 30 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. 2025 Turing award given for quantum information science 114 upvotes, 26 comments
  9. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 243 upvotes, 65 comments
  10. Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code 107 upvotes, 26 comments
  11. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. A sufficiently detailed spec is code 127 upvotes, 43 comments
  13. An x86-64 back end for raven-uxn 23 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. Show HN: Hacker News archive (47M+ items, 11.6GB) as Parquet, updated every 5m 349 upvotes, 143 comments
  15. Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989) 901 upvotes, 423 comments
  16. RX – a new random-access JSON alternative 53 upvotes, 18 comments
  17. LotusNotes 28 upvotes, 8 comments
  18. Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends 68 upvotes, 29 comments
  19. Warranty Void If Regenerated 260 upvotes, 152 comments
  20. We Have Learned Nothing 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root 118 upvotes, 67 comments
  22. Mozilla to launch free built-in VPN in upcoming Firefox 149 47 upvotes, 22 comments
  23. What’s on HTTP? 48 upvotes, 24 comments
  24. Nvidia NemoClaw 280 upvotes, 202 comments
  25. David Altrath Photography Diary 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. What 81,000 people want from AI 21 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. OpenAI Has New Focus (on the IPO) 193 upvotes, 169 comments
  28. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 451 upvotes, 491 comments
  29. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 211 upvotes, 270 comments
  30. Show HN: Browser grand strategy game for hundreds of players on huge maps 11 upvotes, 10 comments

Last generated 2:00pm, 19 March 2026. Source here.
